---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new check, report section, or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Workload / Module

Which Microsoft 365 workload or script does this relate to?

- [ ] Entra ID (`Invoke-EntraAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Exchange Online (`Invoke-ExchangeAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] SharePoint / OneDrive (`Invoke-SharePointAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Mail Security (`Invoke-MailSecurityAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Intune (`Invoke-IntuneAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Teams (`Invoke-TeamsAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Maester CIS Baseline (`Invoke-MaesterAudit.ps1`)
- [ ] Report generation (`Generate-AuditSummary.ps1`)
- [ ] Other / new module

## Problem It Solves

What gap does this fill? Is there a CIS benchmark control or security best practice behind it?

## Proposed Approach

If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here. Not required.

## Additional Context

Any relevant Microsoft documentation, Graph API endpoints, or examples.
